inline: The compiled ContractRuntime guide is authoritative for contract_update next legal action ordering.
Only the thin contract_update start/read/submit-line facade is agent-facing; generic CRUD remains internal.
Observer owns update request, acceptance, and close-ready lines only.
mf_sub owns previous-source read, draft revision precheck, new source revision proof, runtime visibility proof, and asset-binding proposal or waiver evidence.
QA owns independent verification and must not be authored by observer or mf_sub.
Contract semantic changes must be represented as a new source revision with definition_hash and source_sha256 evidence; same-revision active semantic mutation is invalid.

stages.description: Observer requests a source-backed contract revision and binds route, backlog, scope, previous source hash, target source path, and role plan.

lines.description: Observer-authored update request with previous contract identity, expected previous hash, target revision, target roles, owned files, and acceptance criteria.

stages.description: The bounded worker reads the previous source definition and validates the expected hash before drafting a new revision.

lines.description: Worker-authored proof of previous source path, previous raw source_sha256, previous definition_hash, and expected_previous_hash match or explicit block.

stages.description: The bounded worker validates the draft revision shape before writing or adopting the new source revision.

lines.description: Worker-authored precheck showing schema validation, successor graph impact, role-bound lines, lifecycle decision, and same-revision mutation rejection evidence.

stages.description: The worker writes or adopts the new source-controlled revision.

lines.description: Worker-authored new source revision proof with source path, raw source_sha256, definition_hash, previous revision, new revision, successor changes, and CRUD update result.

stages.description: The worker proves the new revision is visible through registry and runtime guide/current-state paths without breaking pinned previous executions.

lines.description: Worker-authored runtime visibility proof for latest-revision resolution, pinned previous revision reads, start/read/current-state, source hash pinning, and next action ordering.

stages.description: The worker records how changed source assets are bound or explicitly waived without direct graph DB writes.

lines.description: Worker-authored asset-binding proposal/review/materialize evidence, follow-up backlog evidence, or explicit waiver for unbound source assets.

stages.description: Independent QA verifies the previous hash, new revision, runtime path, role gates, pinned execution behavior, and asset-binding evidence.

lines.description: QA-authored independent verification; observer and mf_sub writes are rejected for this line.

stages.description: Observer accepts the verified contract update and records close-ready handoff evidence.

lines.description: Observer acceptance after QA verification, including merge/reconcile/backlog close policy and any waivers or follow-ups.
Observer close-ready evidence for the contract_update execution after acceptance.

entrypoint_policy.denied_reason: contract_update must be reached through an approved successor flow, not as a root entrypoint

successors.reason: Run stricter QA evidence review if contract_update verification finds ambiguous evidence.
Use a bounded observer hotfix only for tiny runtime/facade repairs found while executing contract_update.
